category_sources: source_facts.description says it validates MPEG audio streams; official MP3val documentation describes MPEG audio validation and fixing.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and documentation use the name MP3val; source_facts.name is mp3val.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to a Documentation page; manual page is hosted on mp3val.sourceforge.net.
repo_sources: Official MP3val homepage links to SourceForge Subversion; SourceForge code page shows the project repository tree.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes console usage, MPEG audio validation, MP3 focus, and fixing problems.
